    Preschool

    We believe that Living Savior Preschool can expand the child's perception of God, of other people, and of the physical world in which God has placed us.

At A Glance

We are glad you are with us today! Visitors are welcome and asked to sign the Guest Register and Welcome Book in the Narthex through the main entrance.

Worship Services: Every Sunday Morning at 8:30 AM and 11:00 AM

Sunday School: Children, youth and adult Bible classes every Sunday at 9:45 AM

Located At: 5500 Ox Road, Fairfax Station, VA 22039

Contemporary Worship is the first and third Sundays of each month from October through June at 11:00 AM

Whats New & Announcements

1/29

January 29th Bulletin

1/22

2017 Offering Envelopes are now available on a table in the corridor.

1/22

The 2017 Flower Chart is in the walkway! Sign-up today to get your pick of Sundays. Cost for each Sunday is $45.
